title: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals Targets $1B Brand Opportunity as Key Neuropsychiatry Data Looms
text: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals is targeting over $1 billion in combined revenue from its two core franchises. Management outlined plans to reach approximately $1 billion in NUPLAZID sales and roughly $700 million in DAYBUE sales by 2028. The company is expanding its commercial infrastructure with approximately 30% growth in customer-facing teams to capture market share. Key neuropsychiatry data from the Phase II remlifanserin study in Alzheimer's disease psychosis is expected to deliver between August and October 2026. Success in this indication could unlock a significant new revenue stream worth billions in peak sales. The Phase III COMPASS PWS study for ACP-101 in Prader-Willi syndrome is also expected to complete in 2026. Multiple catalysts in the pipeline position ACADIA for significant value creation.
